name: money-os
description: Your AI financial co-pilot — 37 skills across 6 layers: cash flow, portfolio, tax, wealth, market signals, and emotional intelligence. Features a live signal layer via Moomoo MCP (capital flow anomalies, derivatives positioning, technical anomalies, news, sentiment), a YANG Conviction Dashboard (5 signals → OFFENSIVE/NEUTRAL/DEFENSIVE stance), macro radar with Hormuz/Warsh/NAAIM tracking, wheel strategy engine, exit engine, trailing stop engine, and a full article publishing pipeline. Screener, backtester, paper trading, and Freedom Number with Monte Carlo simulation included. Your data never leaves your computer.
